name: Form: Remove Field

description.en: Permanently remove a field from a form.
description.de: Ein Feld dauerhaft aus einem Formular entfernen.

bot: Use this to remove a field from a form. Call form-get first to read the current definition, then remove the target field from definition.actions[0].inputs and submit the full updated definition.

inputs.name: Definition
inputs.bot: The full updated warp definition with the target field removed from definition.actions[0].inputs. Keep all other fields intact.
